drl:
rule "R0"
salience($b0_0_0)
when

rule "R1"

    $p1_0 : T0(f0 == true, f0 != false, $b1_0_0 : f2, f0 == false)

    insertLogical(new T1(-5, $b1_0_0, true, true));
    insertLogical(new T1($p1_0.getF1(), $p1_0.getF2(), true, $p1_0.isF3()));

rule "R2"

    $p2_0 : T0(f3 != true, f3 != true, $b2_0_0 : f2, $b2_0_1 : f2, f3 == false)

rule "R3"
